---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Use Case

Describe the forensic investigation scenario where this would be useful:
- What problem does it solve?
- What workflow does it improve?
- Who would benefit from this?

## 🔧 Proposed Solution

How do you envision this working?

### Example Usage

```bash
# Show how users would interact with this feature
forensics-modules install new-feature
forensics-new-command --option value
```

## 🔀 Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you considered?
- Existing tools that could be used instead
- Workarounds you're currently using
- Why this feature is better

## 📊 Impact

Which areas would this affect?

- [ ] Module system
- [ ] Audit logging
- [ ] Security/permissions
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] New forensic tools
- [ ] Integration with external systems
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Other: _______

## 🌟 Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Critical - Can't use the container without it
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🤝 Contribution

Would you be willing to contribute to implementing this?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Yes, I can help test this
- [ ] Yes, I can help document this
- [ ] No, but I can provide feedback
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting

## 📚 Additional Context

Any other information:
- Links to similar features in other tools
- Screenshots or mockups
- Related forensic standards (NIST, ISO, etc.)
- Academic papers or research
- Industry best practices

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues/PRs for similar requests
- [ ] This aligns with the project's forensic investigation focus
- [ ] I provided a clear use case
- [ ] This doesn't duplicate existing functionality
